---
title: "Nachi Lieder's CV"
author: Nachi Lieder
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pagedown::html_resume:
    # set it to true for a self-contained HTML page but it'll take longer to render
    self_contained: false
    css: my_css.css
    paged-footnotes: true
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

# Aside

<center><img src="headshots/headshot.jpeg" style="width:100%; border-radius: 50%;"/></center>

## Contact Info {#contact}

<i class="fa fa-envelope"></i>
[nachilieder\@gmail.com](mailto:nachilieder@gmail.com){.email}\
Israel | US Citizen | Willing to Relocate\
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/nachi-lieder-87a1b342/)\
<i class="fa fa-brands fa-github"></i>
[GitHub](https://github.com/NachiLieder)\


## Languages {#languages}

English - Native language\
Hebrew - Native language

## Technical Skills

**Machine Learning & Statistics** — Time-Series Forecasting | 25-Month LTV Prediction | Survival Analysis | Causal Inference | MMM | Experimentation Design\
**LLM & AI Systems** — LLM Pipelines | Prompt Engineering & Prompt Analysis | Vector Embeddings | Keyword Optimization | Multi-Step Workflows\
**Engineering** — Python | SQL | AWS | Docker | Prefect | Production ML Systems\
**Leadership** — KPI Framework Design | Executive Reporting | Stakeholder Alignment | Mentorship\
\



## Disclaimer {#disclaimer}

<!--See [short resume](https://mattansb.github.io/CV/resume).-->

Last updated on `r Sys.Date()`.

# Main

## Nachi Lieder, Data Science & AI Systems Lead {#title}

Data Science & AI Systems Lead with 11+ years of experience building production-grade machine learning and LLM-powered systems driving executive decision-making. Lead architect of revenue forecasting, cohort-based LTV modeling, marketing optimization, and KPI intelligence frameworks influencing C-level strategy. Expertise in time-series forecasting, long-horizon LTV prediction, survival analysis, causal inference, vector embeddings, and LLM pipelines. See [Lightricks](#stats-analyst), [GE Healthcare](#GE), and [personal projects](#projects). 

## Professional Experience {data-icon="laptop"}

### Lightricks — Data Science & AI Systems Lead {#stats-analyst}

N/A

N/A

2022–Present

-   Own finance data science domain; partner directly with C-level leadership on revenue strategy and financial planning.\
-   Designed multi-layer revenue KPI framework (North Star → growth drivers → forecasting → monitoring) adopted in executive decision-making.\
-   Built 12-month revenue forecasting systems (~1% monthly error) supporting quarterly and annual planning.\
-   Led cohort-level LTV prediction modeling 25 months ahead, incorporating growth factors and retention dynamics.\
-   Developed MMM-driven marketing budget optimization models influencing allocation decisions.\
-   Delivered 30% CVR uplift through real-time predictive conversion systems.\
-   Designed production LLM pipelines and vector-embedding-based keyword optimization systems.\
-   Built prompt analysis models distinguishing professional vs regular users and modeling intent.\
-   Created multi-step Cursor AI skills and rule-based workflows for development automation and EDA.\
-   Mentored junior data scientists; led technical reviews and defined modeling standards.\

### GE Healthcare — Data Scientist {#GE}

N/A

N/A

2019 - 2022

-   Developed a predictive maintenance system combining LSTM-based anomaly detection with a log-based NLP model, reducing equipment downtime by 24–72 hours and improving failure detection for Nuclear Medicine equipment.
\
-   Led component lifetime prediction & cost optimization, automating benefit analysis pipelines to save hours of future work in cost and KPI-driven decisions.
\
-   Designed end-to-end ML pipelines integrating Industry 4.0 principles, optimizing sensor data collection, processing, and deployment for smarter diagnostics.\

### Panda TS — Data Scientist {#panda}

N/A

N/A

2018 - 2019

-   Built an ML-driven lead scoring system, increasing sales conversion rates by 50%.
\
-   Built customer segmentation models, cutting research time for sales and retention teams.
\

### MKT Mediastats — Data Scientist {#MKT}

N/A

N/A

2015–2018

-   Built media-driven trading models boosting 30%+ annual revenue.\
-   Developed statistical market indicators for institutional portfolios.\

## Education {#education data-icon="graduation-cap" data-concise="true"}

### M.Sc. Statistics

University of Haifa

Haifa, Israel

Graduated 2nd in Class, 2022


### B.E. Industrial Engineering

Technion Institute

Haifa, Israel

Dean's List, 2015


## Publications & Initiatives {data-icon="file" #pubs}

### Peer Reviewed Publications

N/A

N/A

N/A

-   Enhancing Forecasting with a 2D Time Series Approach for Cohort-Based Data (IEEE SSCI, 2025).\
-   From Marketing to the Court: Applying MMM and Fatigue Analysis for Optimal Basketball Lineups (icSPORTS, 2025).\


### Selected Personal Projects {#projects}

#### Bias Detection in Sports Bookkeeping Vendors

-   Developed statistical detection models identifying structural pricing biases and inefficiencies.\

#### Arbitrage Betting Portfolio Management

-   Built quantitative models for opportunity detection, risk allocation, and drift monitoring across betting markets.\
